SEARCH

Uses of Interface
server.scheduler.SchedulerJob

Packages that use SchedulerJob
Package
Description
server.scheduler
Server-side timed jobs: reminders, confirmation timeouts, waiting-list grab expiry, and no-show marking.

  • Uses of SchedulerJob in server.scheduler

    Classes in server.scheduler that implement SchedulerJob
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConfirmTimeoutJob
    Auto-cancels reminded PENDING reservations that were not confirmed within the window.
    class 
    NoShowJob
    Marks past CONFIRMED reservations that nobody ever entered the park for as ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW.
    class 
    ReminderJob
    Sends confirmation reminders for upcoming PENDING reservations.
    class 
    WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
    Sweeps expired waiting-list grab offers.
    Fields in server.scheduler with type parameters of type SchedulerJob
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Map<String,SchedulerJob>
    SchedulerService.jobs
    Insertion-ordered so the console lists jobs in a stable order.
    Methods in server.scheduler with parameters of type SchedulerJob
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    SchedulerService.register(SchedulerJob job)
    Registers a job under its name().
    private void
    SchedulerService.safeRun(SchedulerJob job, boolean force)
    Runs a job, containing any exception so the executor (and the job's recurring schedule) survives a one-off failure.
